title: Targeting arginine metabolism overcomes chemotherapy resistance in aggressive-variant prostate cancers.
snippet: Aggressive-variant prostate cancers (AVPCs) respond poorly to anti-androgen therapy but show sensitivity to taxane-platinum chemotherapy, though outcomes remain poor. We conducted a phase 2 trial testing induction cabazitaxel plus carboplatin (CabCarb) followed by olaparib maintenance versus observation in men with AVPC. The primary endpoint of improved pro...
